nodes.name: Authentication & Department Selection
nodes.plain_english: Workers pick their department and enter a PIN to log in. An admin master PIN unlocks all departments.

nodes.name: Weigh Station
nodes.plain_english: The main screen where workers weigh rolls of material, receiving live weight readings from the connected scale.

nodes.name: Dashboard
nodes.plain_english: Live summary of production output, scrap rates, and quality breakdowns with charts for supervisors.

nodes.name: Warehouse & Inventory
nodes.plain_english: Tracks finished rolls in the warehouse. Workers transfer rolls into inventory and check available stock.

nodes.name: Production History
nodes.plain_english: A log of all past weighing and production events so supervisors can review what was produced and when.

nodes.name: Rework Inbox
nodes.plain_english: Defective or rejected rolls are queued here for the Rework department to pick up and process.

nodes.name: Label Designer & QR Codes
nodes.plain_english: Designs and prints QR-code labels for each roll so it can be scanned and identified across the factory.

nodes.name: Machine Settings
nodes.plain_english: Configures machines and production profiles — machine number, product type, and target weights per department.

nodes.name: Scale Bridge (Hardware Connector)
nodes.plain_english: A Windows background service that reads the physical scale over a COM port and streams the live weight via WebSocket.

nodes.name: Database Schema
nodes.plain_english: Defines all cloud database tables — rolls, products, customers, machine profiles, and production records.

nodes.name: Supabase
nodes.plain_english: Cloud PostgreSQL database and real-time API that stores all production records, roll data, machine profiles, and inventory.

edges.label: receives live weight reading over WebSocket
reads machine profiles and product settings
reads production totals, scrap rates, and quality data
reads and updates roll inventory and transfer records
reads past production and weighing event logs
reads rejected rolls queued for rework and updates their status
reads roll data to generate QR code labels
saves and loads machine profiles and production settings
connects the app to the cloud database using the Supabase client

summary.headline: A factory floor app where workers weigh rolls on a physical scale, track production and defects in real time, and supervisors see live dashboards of output and quality.
